name: Italian Beef on Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 green bell pepper, cored, seeded and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow glass baking dish, mix the beef broth, first measure of olive oil, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, cornstarch, sugar, red pepper, basil, marjoram, and minced garlic.
2. Add the sliced steak to the mixture and stir to coat thoroughly.
3. Cover the dish and refrigerate for 2 or 3 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Drain the beef and reserve the marinade.
5. Heat a large, heavy skillet over low heat and add the second measure of olive oil.
6. Saute the onion and green bell pepper until tender (3-4 minutes), stirring constantly.
7. Stir in the beef and increase the heat to medium.
8. Saute the beef for about 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
9. Stir in the reserved marinade and cook until the sauce thickens (1-2 minutes), stirring frequently.
10. Serve over hot, buttered noodles.
